This is a nominal exit case with continuing functional reliance on the platform. & Nominal exit \\

Harbin & 2026 MTN disclosure, lines 4156-4162;4165-4178;4191-4195 & Prospectus states that the issuer was in the CBIRC full-caliber local-government financing-platform list at the end of 2018 and that on January 2 2019 the Heilongjiang CBIRC office changed its platform category from still-managed-as-platform to exit category. & The issuer has unusually direct formal-exit evidence: the prospectus reports a January 2019 move from still-managed-as-platform to exit category. Yet the same source continues to show infrastructure, affordable housing, PPP, entrusted-construction, government-receivable, and legacy project-development functions. The case is therefore coded as nominal exit rather than substantive disappearance. & Nominal exit \\
